question_intent: Average goals allowed per game by NHL teams that scored in at least one shootout, with at least 100 minutes played by their goalies, and having a coach who won at least one award

plan.question_intent: Average goals allowed per game by NHL teams that scored in at least one shootout, with at least 100 minutes played by their goalies, and having a coach who won at least one award
plan.detail_query: SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award FROM teams AS t JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1) GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
join_clauses: JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
blocks.notes: Teams in the NHL with goalie stats, shootout stats, coach info, and awards, filtered by league, minimum minutes played, and goals scored in shootouts

build_logs.notes: Teams in the NHL with goalie stats, shootout stats, coach info, and awards, filtered by league, minimum minutes played, and goals scored in shootouts

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)

SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block calculating the average goals allowed per game

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_goals_allowed_per_game) AS final_avg_goals_allowed_per_game
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(avg_ga_per_game) AS final_avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average goals allowed per game across all teams that meet the following criteria: they are in the NHL, their goalies have played at least 100 minutes, they have scored at least one shootout goal, and their average goals allowed per game is greater than zero?
